channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lions extend win streak to 10 games, hold off Bears for 23-20 victory
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — The Detroit Lions have been dominant for much of the season, leading the league in point differential after routinely routing opponents. Against Chicago, the Lions were good enough to extend their winning streak to 10 games. Barely.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bill Battle, former Tennessee coach and Alabama AD who founded licensing company, dies
item.description: TUSCALOOSA, Ala. (AP) — Bill Battle III, who was athletic director at his alma mater, Alabama, where he played for Paul “Bear” Bryant's first national championship team, then later coached the Tennessee Volunteers and founded the Collegiate Licensing Company, has died. He was 82.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Detroit Lions survive Bears late-game blunder to end Thanksgiving Day losing streak at 7
item.description: The Detroit Lions are 11-1 for the first time in franchise history after defeating the Chicago Bears 23-20, snapping their Thanksgiving Day losing streak at seven.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: San Jose State is disappointed Boise State forfeited but looks forward to volleyball final
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — San Jose State said Thursday it was disappointed Boise State forfeited its semifinal match in the Mountain West women's volleyball tournament but that the Spartans were focused on the future.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CFB picks Week 14: Our detailed forecast for Oregon-Washington, Arizona State’s advantage, USC’s challenge and Cal’s opportunity
item.description: Washington has won the past three matchups against Oregon, each by three points. This year's version won't be as close.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: SJSU going to Mountain West volleyball final as Boise State forfeits semifinals amid trans player controversy
item.description: Boise State women's volleyball is forfeiting its semifinal match to SJSU in the Mountain West tournament, giving trans athlete Blaire Fleming and the Spartans a free pass to the finals.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Karaban goes to hospital with head injury after No. 2 UConn's loss to Dayton in Maui Invitational
item.description: UConn forward Alex Karaban was taken to a hospital with a head injury after the No. 2 Huskies’ 85-67 loss to Dayton in the seventh-place game of the Maui Invitational.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Tom Wilson's power-play goal lifts the Capitals over the Lightning 5-4
item.description: Tom Wilson scored a power-play goal with 3:26 left in regulation to lift the Washington Capitals to a 5-4 victory against the Tampa Bay Lightning on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jason Kelce got 'tons of advice' from longtime late-night host as he embarks on solo act for ESPN
item.description: As he embarks on his latest sports media project with a late-night show, Jason Kelce said he got "tons of advice" from longtime late-night host Jimmy Kimmel.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Staley counsels some South Carolina fans to keep calm after No. 4 Gamecocks 1st loss in two seasons
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — South Carolina coach Dawn Staley is not in panic mode, even if some of her famous “Fams” are following the Gamecocks' first loss in two seasons. Sure, South Carolina has only lost twice in its past 87 games.
item.dc:creator: PETE IACOBELLI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Luis Suarez signs to stay with Messi and Inter Miami for 2025 season
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Luis Suarez is going to play alongside Lionel Messi for at least one more year. Suarez and Inter Miami have agreed on a one-year contract extension for the coming season, the team announced Wednesday. The financial terms weren't disclosed.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge tosses suit to block trans athlete from NCAA women's tourney
item.description: The judge also noted in his ruling that "no defendant disputed that San Jose State rosters a trans woman volleyball player.
item.dc:creator: Rich McHugh, NewsNation

item.title: Two companies drop McGregor after civil jury ruled he must pay $250K to woman who says he raped her
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Two companies have cut ties with Conor McGregor after a civil court jury in Ireland ruled last week that he must pay nearly 250,000 Euros ($257,000) to a woman who accused the mixed martial arts fighter of raping her. Proximo Spirits, the owner of Irish whiskey brand Proper No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pep Guardiola clarifies his remark about self harm made after Man City's latest bad result
item.description: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has moved to clarify a light-hearted remark he made about wanting to harm himself following his team’s match in the Champions League.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 10 Chicagoland prep football programs will play for an IHSA state championship in Normal this week
item.description: Ten Chicagoland prep football programs will play for an Illinois High School Association state championship later this week in Normal. That includes two based in the city and two that will play each other for the state title in Class 8A, the IHSA's largest division.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: BYU needs some help to reach Big 12 Championship Game
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After a 9-0 start, it appeared as though BYU was destined for the Big 12 Championship Game. But now, they need some help.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: New stadium, new look: Salt Lake Bees unveil 2025 logos, uniforms
item.description: It's a whole new era for the Salt Lake Bees as they prepare for their move to South Jordan where they will play in their brand new home of Daybreak Field.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Special teams miscues prove costly for Bears in overtime loss to Vikings
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Cairo Santos had a field goal blocked — again. DeAndre Carter muffed a punt in the second half. And those were just the special teams mistakes for the struggling Chicago Bears.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Toronto holds off Utah HC, 3-2
item.description: TORONTO (AP) - Mitch Marner scored twice in a second-period surge as the Toronto Maple Leafs defeated the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 on Sunday night to extend their winning streak to four. The victory, in the lone NHL game on the schedule, came in the first meeting between Toronto and Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Seibert misses an extra point late as the Commanders lose their 3rd in a row, 34-26 to the Cowboys
item.description: Austin Seibert choked back tears taking responsibility for missing the extra point that would have tied the score in the final minute. Jeremy Reaves choked back tears blaming himself for a missed assignment that led to a kickoff return touchdown.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Verstappen captures 4th F1 championship after Mercedes sweep of Las Vegas Grand Prix
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Asked how he planned to celebrate his fourth consecutive Formula 1 championship, Max Verstappen did a quick scan of the room searching for a drop of alcohol. “Well, I ran out of beer, so I don't know,” he said. “Maybe another one, and then maybe I switch to something else.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BYU sweeps men's and women's cross-country national titles
item.description: WACO, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU became just the fifth school ever to win national titles in both men's and women's cross-country. The #1 ranked women's team won its sixth in program history, with a team score of 147 at the Zimmer Championship Course Saturday morning.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
